calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent decree" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
